caption: Three people sit in chairs on a stage with a dark background and purple neon lights. On the left, a man with dark hair and a beard wears a white button-down shirt and gray trousers. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt and black pants. On the right, a man wears a gray suit jacket over a light blue shirt and gray trousers. Between the man on the left and the woman, a white boxy structure sits on a small table. The woman and the man on the right appear to be engaged in conversation, with the woman gesturing with her hand in the beginning. As the sequence progresses, the man on the left looks toward the other two, and the woman shifts her posture and expression. The text "SL" is partially visible on a panel behind the man on the right.
